title: AOI
description: The Arab Organization for Industrialization (AOI) is a state-owned enterprise created in 1975 by Egypt, Saudi Arabia, the United Arab Emirates and Qatar to coordinate the collective development of the Arab defense industry and related civilian manufacturing capacities. Wholly owned by Egypt since 1993, AOI employs around 16,000 people (1,250 of them engineers) across its twelve factories and joint ventures, plus the Arab Institute for Development Technology.

title: Aya Store
description: Aya Store, where elegance meets authenticity. Inspired by the rich cultural heritage of Cairo, Egypt, Aya Store offers a curated collection of timeless pieces designed for individuals who value sophistication and craftsmanship. Each product tells a story of artistry, care, and refinement, elevating your style with unmatched quality.

body.raw:
Introduction

Welcome to Aya Store, where elegance meets authenticity. Inspired by the rich cultural heritage of Cairo, Egypt, Aya Store offers a curated collection of timeless pieces designed for individuals who value sophistication and craftsmanship. Each product tells a story of artistry, care, and refinement, elevating your style with unmatched quality.


Mission

Our mission is to deliver unparalleled luxury to our customers through carefully crafted and ethically sourced products. We aim to celebrate individuality by offering unique, high-quality designs that inspire confidence and a sense of timeless elegance.


Vision

To become a global icon of luxury, blending tradition with modernity. We strive to set new standards in sustainable elegance while remaining deeply rooted in our heritage, creating a bridge between culture and contemporary fashion.

title: Be Different
description: Be Different is a non-profit dedicated to challenging bullying by empowering communities with knowledge, empathy, and proactive tools. The strategy outlined below will build a strong, compassionate brand identity, position the foundation as a trusted voice, and create measurable change through education, advocacy, and community engagement.

title: Desoky
description: Desouky is a pioneering application that aims to connect users to a source of spiritual inspiration and tranquility through reading the Holy Quran and supplications, in addition to providing an interpretation of the Shadhiliyya Desouqiyya method. The application is designed to be a dedicated platform to come to this purpose and the definition that many Egyptians have dedicated to it, especially the generations that have surpassed the aging population.

body.raw:
Introduction

Desouky is a pioneering application that aims to connect users to a source of spiritual inspiration and tranquility through reading the Holy Quran and supplications, in addition to providing an interpretation of the Shadhiliyya Desouqiyya method. The application is designed to be a dedicated platform to come to this purpose and the definition that many Egyptians have dedicated to it, especially the generations that have surpassed the aging population.


Message

Providing a modern and easy digital platform that combines technology and a rich spiritual heritage, to be compatible with the connection to the Holy Quran, daily supplications, and is characterized by the Shadhiliyya Desouqiyya method, including strengthening the faith and the oasis of the soul for users.


Vision

For Desouky to become the primary application for fans of the Shadhiliyya Desouqiyya method and its members in companies in Egypt and abroad, and for the modern one to inspire current and future generations with the rich spiritual heritage through technology.


Brand Voice

Desouky's voice is characterized by calm, dignity, and simplicity, with a spiritual touch that reminds of divine greatness and the importance of tranquility. We are keen to use an Arabic language that is understandable and used with respect and spirituality, while designing the privacy of the basic points and tastes of users of the specific age group.

title: Dr. Ahmed Ammar Clinic
description: Dr. Ahmed Ammar’s Clinic, where advanced science meets artistic finesse to reveal the most confident version of you. At our state-of-the-art aesthetic center, we are dedicated to empowering individuals with personalized, innovative treatments that enhance natural beauty. Under the expert guidance of Dr. Ahmed Ammar, our clinic seamlessly blends precision technology with compassionate care to deliver exceptional results—whether you’re looking to rejuvenate your skin with laser treatments, restore volume with expertly administered fillers, smooth fine lines with Botox, or revitalize hair growth using plasma injections.

title: Egyptian Space Agency
description: The Egyptian Space Agency is an Egyptian public economic authority established in August 2019, with a legal personality and affiliated with the President of the Arab Republic of Egypt. Established by the Law No. 3 of 2018 which aims to create, transfer space technology development, localization and own self-capabilities to build & launch satellites from Egyptian territory. In 2022, The Egyptian President Abdel Fattah Al-Sisi announced the appointment of Prof.Dr. Sherif Sedky as the CEO of the Egyptian Space Agency.

title: Green Locks
description: a brand where nature’s purity meets the art of hair care. Inspired by the vitality of lush greenery and the timeless beauty of healthy locks, Green Locks is dedicated to crafting premium, eco-conscious hair care products that nurture both hair and the planet.

title: Life Makers
description: Life Makers—a name that embodies hope, resilience, and the power of collective action. Rooted in the heart of Egypt, our non-profit organization is dedicated to uplifting marginalized communities by transforming compassion into tangible change.

title: Lokoji
description: Lokoji a name rooted in the ancient Coptic language, meaning "Gold." Just as gold symbolizes enduring value and prosperity, Lokoji emerges as a dynamic hub for economic insight, bridging Egypt’s vibrant economy with the complexities of global markets.

body.raw:
Introduction

Lokoji is a modern financial platform dedicated to providing real-time insights and resources about the Egyptian stock market. We connect everyday investors, financial enthusiasts, and industry professionals with the tools and knowledge they need to track, analyze, and invest in Egyptian companies. Lokoji empowers users to navigate the complexities of the stock market with clarity and confidence, making financial growth accessible to all.


Mission

Our mission is to democratize access to Egypt's stock market by delivering reliable, actionable insights and fostering financial literacy. Through cutting-edge technology and a user-first approach, we aim to empower individuals to make informed investment decisions and contribute to the growth of Egypt's economic landscape.


Vision

To become Egypt’s leading financial companion, fostering a community of informed investors and establishing trust and transparency in the financial sector. We envision a future where every Egyptian has the knowledge and resources to participate in and benefit from the stock market’s growth.


Brand Voice

Lokoji speaks with an approachable, trustworthy, and empowering tone.

  • We equip our users with the knowledge and tools they need to make informed decisions and take control of their financial future.
  • Approachable: We simplify complex financial concepts, breaking them down into clear and actionable insights that everyone can understand.
  • Trustworthy: We prioritize accuracy, transparency, and reliability in all the information we provide.

Empowering

We inspire confidence in our users, encouraging them to take charge of their financial futures and explore opportunities within the Egyptian stock market.

title: Nofri Store
description: Nofri a name that whispers “Hello” in the ancient Coptic language, inviting you into a world where the mystique of Egypt’s past collides with the bold futurism of vaporwave aesthetics. Nofri Store is more than an e-commerce destination; it’s a cultural time machine, reimagining Pharaoh-era grandeur through neon-lit, cyberpunk-inspired designs.

title: Authority for Urban Planning
description: The General Authority for Urban Planning is the state agency responsible for formulating the general policy for planning and sustainable urban development, preparing plans and programs for this development at the national, regional and governorate levels, and reviewing and approving urban plans at the local level within the framework of national and regional goals and policies.
